# Mister Mortgage USA

> Miami's trusted mortgage broker — expert guidance, fast approvals, and personalized service for homebuyers and investors in South Florida. NMLS #2572035.

Mister Mortgage USA is a licensed mortgage brokerage based in Miami, FL. We help clients navigate FHA, VA, USDA, Conventional, Jumbo, and specialty loan programs with 20+ years of combined experience. We serve all of South Florida including Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties.

- Phone: (305) 615-1515
- Email: info@mistermortgageusa.com
- Address: 6030 Bird Rd, Miami, FL 33155
- Hours: Monday–Friday 9AM–6PM | Saturday 10AM–3PM
- WhatsApp: +1 (305) 615-1515
- NMLS: #2572035

## Pages

### Home
- URL: https://mistermortgageusa.com/
- Description: Overview of loan programs, mortgage calculator, client testimonials, and pre-qualification CTA. Miami's go-to mortgage broker for FHA, VA, USDA, Conventional, and Jumbo loans.

### Loan Options Overview
- URL: https://mistermortgageusa.com/loan-options.html
- Description: Complete directory of all mortgage programs offered — government-backed loans, conventional, jumbo, and specialty products.

### Fixed Rate Mortgage Miami
- URL: https://mistermortgageusa.com/fixed-rate-mortgage-miami.html
- Description: 15-year and 30-year fixed rate mortgages with predictable monthly payments. Best for buyers who want long-term stability.

### FHA Home Loan Miami
- URL: https://mistermortgageusa.com/fha-home-loan-miami.html
- Description: FHA loans with down payments as low as 3.5%, flexible credit score requirements (580+), and government-backed security. Ideal for first-time buyers.

### VA Home Loan Miami
- URL: https://mistermortgageusa.com/va-home-loan-miami.html
- Description: Zero down payment VA loans for eligible veterans, active-duty service members, and surviving spouses. No PMI required.

### USDA Loan Florida
- URL: https://mistermortgageusa.com/usda-loan-florida.html
- Description: 100% financing (zero down payment) for eligible rural and suburban properties in Florida. Income limits apply.

### Jumbo Loans Miami
- URL: https://mistermortgageusa.com/jumbo-loans-miami.html
- Description: Financing above the conforming loan limit ($766,550+) for luxury properties and high-value real estate in South Florida. Loan amounts up to $5M+.

### Low Down Payment Mortgage
- URL: https://mistermortgageusa.com/low-down-payment-mortgage.html
- Description: Down payment assistance programs, 3% down conventional loans, and options for buyers with limited cash reserves.

### First-Time Homebuyer Miami
- URL: https://mistermortgageusa.com/first-time-homebuyer-miami.html
- Description: Specialized guidance, programs, and incentives for first-time homebuyers in Miami and South Florida.

### Investment Property Loans Miami
- URL: https://mistermortgageusa.com/investment-property-loans-miami.html
- Description: Financing solutions for rental properties, multi-family units, and real estate investment portfolios in South Florida.

### Mortgage Refinance Miami
- URL: https://mistermortgageusa.com/mortgage-refinance-miami.html
- Description: Rate-and-term refinance, cash-out refinance, and streamline refinance options to lower payments or access home equity.

### Rehab Loan 203k
- URL: https://mistermortgageusa.com/rehab-loan-203k.html
- Description: FHA 203(k) renovation loans that combine home purchase and renovation costs into a single mortgage.

### About Us
- URL: https://mistermortgageusa.com/about-us.html
- Description: Company history, mission, and values. Mister Mortgage USA has served the South Florida community for 20+ years.

### Our Team
- URL: https://mistermortgageusa.com/our-team.html
- Description: Meet the licensed mortgage professionals and loan officers at Mister Mortgage USA.

## Services

- Mortgage Pre-Qualification (11-step guided process)
- FHA Loans (3.5% down, 580+ credit score)
- VA Loans (0% down for veterans)
- USDA Loans (0% down for eligible areas)
- Fixed Rate Mortgages (15 and 30 year)
- Adjustable Rate Mortgages
- Jumbo Loans (up to $5M+)
- Low Down Payment Programs (3% down conventional)
- Down Payment Assistance Programs
- First-Time Homebuyer Programs
- Investment Property Financing
- Multi-Family Loans
- Cash-Out Refinance
- Rate-and-Term Refinance
- FHA Streamline Refinance
- VA IRRRL (Interest Rate Reduction Refinance Loan)
- FHA 203(k) Renovation Loans
- Bilingual Service (English and Spanish)

## Key Facts

- Licensed in Florida
- NMLS License: #2572035
- 20+ years of experience in South Florida real estate finance
- $1B+ in loans closed
- Service area: Miami-Dade, Broward, Palm Beach, and all of Florida
- Languages: English and Spanish (Español)
- Equal Housing Opportunity lender
